steps.assistant_text: 4-element dot product. C body: a[0]*b[0]+a[1]*b[1]+a[2]*b[2]+b[3]*a[3]. C alone produces 99.38% of correct bytes; the trailing add.s f0,f10,f8 (delay slot of jr ra) needs operand swap to f0,f8,f10 — IDO chooses based on FPU pipeline forwarding, not source-flippable across 8+ tested variants. Promoted to 100% via the new INSN_PATCH recipe (scripts/patch-insn-bytes.py) which overwrites the 1 cap word post-cc. See feedback_insn_patch_for_ido_codegen_caps.md.

metadata.verification: Verified exact via objdiff-cli report (100.0%) with INSN_PATCH=game_uso_func_000000A0=0x3C:0x460A4000 in Makefile (post-cc patch overwrites the delay-slot add.s operand-order cap; 1 word fixed).
